title: VG narration-strings.yaml (v1) — UAT keys subset
description: Validates that narration-strings.yaml contains UAT-required keys per D-18. Permissive on other key categories (gate_*, goal_*, view_*, fix_*, override_*, debt_*, telemetry_*) — those are validated by narration-strings-validators.yaml (existing). This schema only enforces the UAT subset added in Phase 15. Used by verify-uat-strings-no-hardcode.py forward check (each {{uat_*}} reference in UAT-NARRATIVE.md must resolve to a key validated here). Schema is permissive on additional uat_* keys (validators may add more in future).

localized_string.description: Per existing convention in narration-strings.yaml: 'en' required as fallback locale, 'vi' optional but strongly preferred for VG default locale.
